description_long: This is a stylized tree with a tall, slightly curved brown trunk and two distinct clusters of green foliage. The main canopy is broad and dense, composed of overlapping, simple, broad leaves with visible dark veins, forming a rounded crown at the top. A secondary, smaller cluster of leaves emerges from a lower branch, adding visual interest and asymmetry to the structure. The trunk is relatively slender at the base and thickens slightly as it rises, with a smooth, matte texture. The foliage is vibrant green, with the upper leaves casting shadows on those below, and the overall form suggests a healthy, mature tree suitable for parks or urban green spaces. No roots are visible above ground, and the tree's stylized appearance makes it ideal for digital urban environments.
description: A stylized tree with a curved brown trunk and two dense clusters of broad green leaves, featuring a rounded main canopy and a smaller lower branch cluster.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main leafy canopy at the top and a smaller foliage cluster on the left side of the trunk.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the trunk and the separation between the upper and lower leaf clusters.
description_view_2: Rear view with the main canopy and lower foliage cluster aligned vertically, trunk base visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the trunk's curve and the lower foliage cluster more prominently on the right.
